## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, review the generation process, and discuss future comms alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Blocked:** The "Direct vs. Indirect Procurement" article is ready but blocked by a pending Framer access request for the `pod zero` account.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 4–6 articles are targeted for publishing by EOW/early next week, with Ben reviewing 6 articles (Status 4) and Sydney revising 2 (Status 5).](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Process Alignment:** GrowthX will adopt Ben's Gong-derived pain points and add direct links to analyst sources to improve content relevance and build relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**Comms Alignment:** A new monthly/quarterly "comms huddle" will align GrowthX, Gumshoe, and a new PR team on shared personas and topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

## Topics

### Content Status & Pipeline

  - [**"Direct vs. Indirect Procurement" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Ready for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Requires Framer access for the `pod zero` account.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [**Action:** Ben to grant access.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [**Method:** Replace the existing blog post with the new content.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [**Ben's Review (Status 4):** 6 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**Sydney's Revision (Status 5):** 2 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
      - [**New Drafts:** 7 articles due by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [**Publishing Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**EOW:** 4 articles (including the ready one).](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [**Early Next Week:** 2 additional articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [**Glossary Article:** "Invoice Processing" is in production and will serve as the template for the full glossary.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Content Feedback & Refinements

  - [**Color Scheme:** Sydney to verify all images use the correct hex values for the LightSource orange/red, which appears differently across screens.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [**Writing Style:** Reduce repetitive, "punchy" sentences (e.g., three-word sentences) for better readability.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This style is effective for emphasis but becomes tiring when overused.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [**Source Linking:** Add direct links to analyst firm reports.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Supports claims and builds relationships with analysts.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### GrowthX's Agentic Content Process

  - [Aida detailed GrowthX's agentic pipeline, built on the Atlas platform.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Key Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
    1.  [**Outline Control:** Human-controlled outlines ensure logical flow and topic relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
    2.  [**Research:** Uses advanced tools (Exa, Tavoli) to generate and answer questions.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
    3.  [**Fact-Checking:** An agent verifies claims against sources, flagging unverified statements.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
    4.  [**Human Fine-Tuning:** The process delivers content that is 80–90% complete.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### LLM Monitoring & Comms Alignment

  - [**Problem:** Ben's marketing team is a "one-man band" needing comms alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new "comms huddle" will align GrowthX, Gumshoe (LLM monitoring), and a new PR team.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
      - [**Goal:** Share consistent personas and topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
      - [**Source:** Ben's Gong-call analysis of prospect pain points.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Scrunch Dashboard Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
      - [**Visibility:** 8% vs. top competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
      - [**Citation Rate:** 2.5% (vs. 5% average).](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Action:** Ben's pain points will be added as prompts to Scrunch for consistent monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

### Sprint Review & Next Steps

  - [**Sprint Status:** Week 6 of 8.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**Decision Point:** Ben to confirm continuation by EOW next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows for 2 weeks of transition planning (weeks 7–8) if the engagement continues.](https://fathom.video/share/Lrypv5DtLzxALetyhssxHmedvJ-xpeR7?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
